boundary_extraction_contract_interpretat: source_excerpt must be an exact contiguous substring of the frozen source_text in the identified anchor.
Paraphrase, summarization, regeneration, token substitution, punctuation change, whitespace change, or undeclared Unicode normalization is invalid.
occurrence_index is evaluated only after at least one exact substring match exists.
occurrence_index disambiguates repeated exact substrings and does not authorize approximate matching.

A source_excerpt_not_found result proves non-verbatim output but does not by itself distinguish paraphrase from punctuation, whitespace, omission, insertion, or other mutation because raw provider text is not retained.
